codeReview.summary: End-to-end validation feature completed successfully. All verification steps executed and passed: bun run check (Biome), tsc --noEmit (TypeScript), 15 capacity tests, and browser automation for citizen and admin flows. Cross-area flows VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-005 validated. Audit trail verification confirmed via UI inspection and database query. No blocking issues identified.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Handoff commit ID mismatch: The handoff references commitId '191c22c' which is titled 'test: user testing validation for audit-trail milestone' and adds files to .factory/validation/audit-trail/. The actual commit for polish milestone scrutiny validation is '3b1ef17' titled 'test: scrutiny validation for polish milestone'. The end-to-end-validation work was performed by worker session 8c87d644 but the commit that created this review file is 3b1ef17.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git log shows: 191c22c = audit-trail, 3b1ef17 = polish scrutiny. Handoff file lists commitId: 191c22c but review file was added in 3b1ef17.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used browser automation (agent-browser skill) for citizen flow validation and database inspection for schedule propagation - appropriate methods for testing full OTP→confirmation→email flow and verifying slot generation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff interactiveChecks show: Browser automation: OTP login flow, Citizen scheduling flow, Confirmation email, Admin audit log, Admin schedule configuration

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used code analysis for VAL-CROSS-005 (hold expiration) rather than live testing, which is appropriate for verifying expiration logic without time-based testing.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff: 'Confirmed VAL-CROSS-005 (hold expiration) via code analysis' - verified expireStaleCitizenHolds() and confirmBooking() expiration detection

sharedStateObservations.observation: No source code changes were made by this feature - it is a validation-only feature that tests existing functionality. This is appropriate for the feature type.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show 3b1ef17 shows only .factory/validation/ files added, no src/ code changes

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation state correctly updated: VAL-CROSS-001, VAL-CROSS-004, VAL-CROSS-005 show 'validatedAtMilestone: polish' and 'status: passed'. VAL-CROSS-002 and VAL-CROSS-003 show 'status: pass' from earlier document-management milestone.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-state.json lines 457-479 show cross-area flow validation statuses

summary: End-to-end validation PASSED. Worker executed all verification steps: lint (bun run check), typecheck (tsc --noEmit), 15 capacity tests, and browser automation for citizen OTP→confirmation flow and admin audit trail. All cross-area flows VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-005 are validated working. VAL-CROSS-001 and VAL-CROSS-004 and VAL-CROSS-005 were validated at polish milestone; VAL-CROSS-002 and VAL-CROSS-003 validated at document-management milestone (earlier). Note: Handoff commitId (191c22c) does not match the actual polish commit (3b1ef17) - the work was done correctly but the commit reference is wrong. No blocking issues.
